description: Increments a retry metric with a hard limit, clamping at the specified cap if reached.

conditions: cap is not None and counters[key] > cap
description: Ensures that the retry metric is clamped at the specified cap if it exceeds the cap.

conditions: not cap is not None or not counters[key] > cap
description: No clamping is needed as either the cap is None or the retry metric is not greater than the cap.
